title: Battle lines drawn over Christchurch's $421M fiber network
summary: Christchurch's debt-laden city council is again likely to vote on whether to sell off New Zealand's Enable Network, a profitable broadband asset.

title: The 22nd Annual Leading Lights Awards is open for entries. Here's what's new for 2026
summary: Light Reading's Leading Lights Awards are open for nominations today. The 2026 program expands to 30 categories, with 14 new additions reflecting the industry's focus on agentic AI, satellite connectivity, optical networking and telecom security.

title: Neoclouds not ready for AI networking – Omdia
summary: Omdia study finds that providers have scaled compute for AI workloads, but networking infrastructure is becoming a critical constraint. #pressrelease

title: EdgeBeam connects with Soracom for emerging hybrid network
summary: EdgeBeam said it will tap into Soracom's 4G/5G platform for an emerging hybrid network that will support both ATSC 3.0 and terrestrial cellular connectivity. #pressrelease

title: Optimum targets AT&T, Verizon with 'UnBig Your Bill' campaign
summary: Optimum is getting more aggressive in mobile with a new 'UnBig Your Bill' campaign in retail outlets that provides consumers with like-for-like price comparisons with AT&T and Verizon. #pressrelease

title: The smartphone industry is marketing AI to people who just need a phone that works
summary: New Recon Analytics data shows cracked screens and dead batteries – not AI upgrades – are driving US device purchases.

title: Comcast shines up unlimited mobile plans, halts sale of by-the-Gig plans
summary: Comcast is bringing a premium-level data policy to all its unlimited plans and confirms it is no longer selling by-the-Gig plans to new Xfinity Mobile customers.

title: LG Uplus tackles IMSI vulnerability with new SIM card rollout
summary: The company's SIM replacement program addresses a potential security risk posed by a vulnerability in its IMSI system.

title: ACA Connects takes bulk billing defense to the FTC
summary: ACA Connects filed comments with the Federal Trade Commission defending the use of bulk billing for cable and broadband services in rental housing properties, calling it good for competition and beneficial for low-income tenants.

title: Eurobites: German regulator targets underperforming mobile operators
summary: Also in today's EMEA regional roundup: Proptivity deploys Ericsson's shared indoor coverage feature; Zen hooks up with eero to offer mesh Wi-Fi to SMEs; Hisense gains ground in European smart TV market.

title: Startup ODC charts AI-RAN course through private 5G
summary: Former Altiostar open RAN engineers are back with new startup ODC and an Nvidia-based AI-RAN platform that supports sensing apps for private 5G networks.

title: HPE AI Networking - Scale Up, Scale Out, and Scale Across | OFC 2026
summary: At OFC 2026, HPE leaders discuss AI driven networking for Scale Up, Scale Out, and Scale Across solutions for the data center, DCI, and WAN use cases—covering Ethernet for AI, 1.6T switching, PTX routing, and AI powered operations. Learn more at https://www.hpe.com/networking

title: The decline and fall of the Telecom Italia empire
summary: Previously one of Europe's most valuable telecom companies, Telecom Italia is now a fraction of its former size and may be destined for state ownership.

title: Nokia, Blaize target AI inference gap in APAC
summary: Nokia and Blaize are developing a hybrid AI architecture to address inference deployment challenges in the APAC region.

title: Winncom launches program to help with BEAD compliance
summary: Winncom's new BEAD Post-Award Compliance Assistance Program is designed to help broadband providers move from funding selection to project implementation more efficiently. #pressrelease

title: Amazon nets Globalstar for $11.5B, signs new Apple pact
summary: Amazon has inked a deal to acquire Globalstar for about $11.6 billion, a transaction that will spark its move into the D2D arena and complement its expanding Amazon Leo platform. Amazon has also secured a new satellite connectivity deal with Apple.

title: SkyFiber picks Nokia for BEAD-supported buildout
summary: SkyFiber has tapped Nokia to support a partially BEAD-funded buildout project in Northern Nevada. #pressrelease

title: China smartphone shipments fell 1% in Q1 2026 as rising costs pushed up device prices – Omdia
summary: In Q1 2026, the combined market share of the top six vendors – Huawei, Apple, Xiaomi, OPPO, vivo, and HONOR – reached 94%. #pressrelease

title: Here comes Starlink, the next telecom giant
summary: SpaceX is building out a global telco of immense scale, reaching into both fixed-line broadband and the direct-to-device mobile segment.

title: Amazon to scoop up Globalstar
summary: Amazon has inked a deal to acquire Globalstar, a deal that aims to expand the reach and services offered by Amazon Leo, a unit focused on deploying a constellation of thousands of low-Earth orbit satellites. #pressrelease
